sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n59321" key="kosmodioikhtiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κοσμο-διοικητικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n59321.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">governing the world</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Stob.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.7.3</biblScope> </bibl> f.</sense> </entryFree>
